sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value UInt32);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, intExp10(2));
UPDATE test_table SET value = intExp10(3) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, intExp10(value) AS exp_value FROM test_table;
SELECT intExp10(5) AS exp_result UNION ALL SELECT intExp10(4);
